name: monik-tuya-sdk-bridge
description: MoniK server bridge for importing devices obtained by the Tuya mobile SDK without Tuya developer cloud keys on the server.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/deviceStore.js && node --check src/tuyaClient.js && node --check src/adbBridge.js && node --check src/monikTokenClient.js && node --check public/app.js
